title: cli.schema-v1
description: Meta-schema for src/data/generated/cli.schema-v1.json — the forge CLI command-tree export contract. forge emits artifacts conforming to this schema; forge-site validates before rendering (FW-16/FW-17). Command order in the 'commands' array IS the rendering order; no separate index field is needed.

schema_version.description: Contract version. New fields are additive/backward-compatible; removed or renamed fields require a new schema_version and a forge-site renderer update before merge.

forge_sha.description: forge commit SHA the export was generated from.

global_options.description: Shared option definitions available to every command. A command references the ones it inherits by name in its own inherited_options array, rather than duplicating the full definition.

commands.description: Flat list of every command node, in rendering order.

default.description: The option's default value; use null when there is none. Type is unconstrained since it depends on the option's own 'type'.

ordering.description: Explicit rendering-order rule for this command's arguments/options arrays, independent of how the emitter happened to list them.

command.description: A hidden command only needs id/name/path/hidden populated. A non-hidden command must carry every field below (build fails otherwise).

id.description: Stable identifier used as the URL slug. Renaming this without a schema_version bump is a breaking change.

path.description: Full command path, e.g. 'forge ops check'.

inherited_options.description: Names referencing entries in the top-level global_options array.

hidden.description: Hidden commands are excluded from rendered docs.

deprecated.description: false/absent-equivalent when not deprecated; a string carries the deprecation message rendered as a callout.
